inputs.label: Initial Investment (USD)
inputs.businessContext: Total upfront cost for product redesign, tooling, and process changes to extend product life. Based on capital budgeting principles (NPV/ROI).

inputs.label: Annual Revenue per Unit (USD)
inputs.businessContext: Revenue generated per product unit per year. Used to calculate revenue impact of extended life. Standard financial metric.

inputs.label: Units Sold per Year
inputs.businessContext: Annual sales volume. Key driver for revenue and cost calculations. Based on sales forecasting.

inputs.label: Current Product Life (Years)
inputs.businessContext: Average lifespan of current product before replacement. Determines baseline replacement cycle. Industry benchmark data.

inputs.label: Extended Product Life (Years)
inputs.businessContext: Target lifespan after circular economy improvements. Must be greater than current life. Based on design for longevity principles.

inputs.label: Annual Operating Cost per Unit (USD)
inputs.businessContext: Cost to maintain and operate product per year (e.g., energy, repairs). Relevant for total cost of ownership (TCO).

inputs.label: Discount Rate (%)
inputs.businessContext: Weighted average cost of capital (WACC) or required rate of return. Used for NPV calculation. Standard finance.

inputs.label: Data Confidence Level
inputs.businessContext: Subjective confidence in input data accuracy. Adjusts output reliability. Common in risk analysis.

thresholds.extendedProductLifeYears: if extendedProductLifeYears <= currentProductLifeYears then 'ERROR: Extended life must be greater than current life'
thresholds.discountRate: if discountRate > 20 then 'WARNING: High discount rate may indicate high risk'
thresholds.annualOperatingCostPerUnit: if annualOperatingCostPerUnit > annualRevenuePerUnit then 'WARNING: Operating cost exceeds revenue per unit'

hiddenLossDrivers: if annualOperatingCostPerUnit > annualRevenuePerUnit then 'Operating cost exceeds revenue per unit'
suggestedActions: if roi < 0 then 'Consider reducing initial investment or increasing product life extension'
if paybackPeriod > 5 then 'Focus on faster payback through cost reduction'
if annualOperatingCostPerUnit > 0.5 * annualRevenuePerUnit then 'Reduce operating costs via design improvements'
